title: Votes
description: The details of votes on an issue.

hasVoted.description: Whether the user making this request has voted on the issue.

self.description: The URL of these issue vote details.

voters.description: List of the users who have voted on this issue. An empty list is returned when the calling user doesn't have the *View voters and watchers* project permission.

votes.description: The number of votes on the issue.
